description_long: This hammer features a futuristic, industrial design with a tall, vertical structure mounted on a hexagonal base. The main body is composed of a dark, metallic material with gold or bronze accents, and geometric line patterns etched into its surface. At the top, a prominent hammer head is integrated into the structure, with a central blue-lit core and symmetrical metallic extensions on either side, suggesting advanced technology or energy-based functionality. The handle is a long, slender rod that runs vertically from the base to the hammer head, reinforced with metallic segments and a central shaft. The base is wide and stable, providing support for the upright hammer, and the entire object is set on a flat, dark platform. The overall appearance is sleek, robust, and visually striking, suitable for a high-tech urban environment or as a display piece.
description: A tall, futuristic hammer with a dark metallic body, gold accents, and a glowing blue core, mounted on a hexagonal base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hammer's detailed face, blue-lit core, and symmetrical metallic extensions, with geometric patterns on the body.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the slim profile of the hammer and the vertical alignment of the handle and head, emphasizing its thickness and structural depth.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same geometric patterns and central shaft, but with less detail on the hammer head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlights the narrowness and verticality of the hammer's design.
attribute_handle_type: Straight metallic handle with segmented reinforcements, smooth surface, and no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Specialized hammer head with a central blue-lit core and symmetrical metallic extensions, resembling a futuristic sledge or energy hammer.
